title: Tagine with Tomato and Piquant Sauce
description: A flavorful North African-inspired stew made with tender tomatoes and a piquant sauce, served with aerated flatbread.
instructions: Cut the tomatoes in half and place them in a large bowl.
In a small saucepan, heat the piquant sauce over medium heat.
Add the piquant sauce to the tomatoes and toss to coat.
Spoon the tomato mixture into a tagine or a large Dutch oven.
Cover the tagine with a lid or foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Slice the aerated flatbread into wedges and serve alongside the tagine.
If using cheese, sprinkle it on top of the tagine before serving.
